text.message: Thats all on you. you chose that. you also had a dominate set up. so I just wanted everyone to see that and hopefully not trade you.
i thought u were j mad i plowed you
but the board was locked and it was my only good pick
I sent zero messages in chat and moved the robber once at the end of game.
yeah u didnt do anything wrong or bad
you solo'd me 4 times. I said nothing.
yeah cuz i thought u were being salty
If i feel like you are going to win the game im not going to. hand it to you.
the rest of the table was bad tho
the other two players fighting was pointless.
red if u go 8 10 3 ill trade u wheat
think green with it may be too strong
auto gg for u green w 8 3 10
dont ask if you arent going to honor it
lol why do you hate green
he wanted to take the sheep port
red has better wheat and ore
and an strong port as well
if i had rb i wouldve blocked you
red cuz ur handing game to green
blue was ahead of green but i chose to not solo this early
yeah u chose to rob me 😂
u also had 2 devs and everyone else had 0
black. You take army red takes road. I have to try and build to 10
im robbing u anyways j take it
its cool you have a bad read on this particular game.
once u city its ultra gg
u do see the road contention no?
red r u gonna take road
no cuz blue will just take it back
im saying if u took to cut him off
red imma go from u cuz 2/6 or NS
its on you to hold road
stealing from me is asinine black
yeah well u gotta keep it
much harder when im being targeted
my game is devs and if i cant buy then i have nothing to do
so accepting a ns nets Blue minus one card, you 0, and me motion
if blue wins then you cant lol
black do u think trading with blue helps or hurts you
well then i cant help u
you can by making a deal
refusing to work with other players doesnt help
making the wrong play again and again makes u lose. period
red you have no idea how the game works
black youre such a toxic player
hes fighting with me because i robbed him
blue wins with 2 roads and youre trading with him... what is so hard to understand
yeah, NOW he does, last turn he didnt
well u gotta see a turn ahead
